query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750017, 'The prophetic voice in the church today should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Replace Scripture","Complement and apply Scripture","Contradict tradition","Predict lottery numbers"]', 'Complement and apply Scripture', 1),
(750017, 'Contemporary prophetic ministry must be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accepted without question","Subject to biblical testing and accountability","Independent of church leadership","Based on personal feelings alone"]', 'Subject to biblical testing and accountability', 2),
(750017, 'The church''s prophetic role includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Political lobbying only","Speaking God''s truth to culture and society","Accumulating wealth","Avoiding controversy"]', 'Speaking God''s truth to culture and society', 3),
(750017, 'Prophetic preaching differs from teaching in its emphasis on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Information transfer only","Urgent application and divine confrontation","Entertainment value","Historical facts alone"]', 'Urgent application and divine confrontation', 4),
(750017, 'The prophetic community should be characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Competition and rivalry","Mutual accountability and humility","Independence from the church","Secrecy and exclusivity"]', 'Mutual accountability and humility', 5),
(750017, 'Social justice concerns in prophetic ministry reflect:', 'multiple_choice', '["Political ideology","God''s heart for the oppressed and marginalized","Human philosophy","Cultural trends"]', 'God''s heart for the oppressed and marginalized', 6),
(750017, 'The prophetic call to repentance is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Outdated and irrelevant","Essential for spiritual renewal","Only for unbelievers","Optional for mature Christians"]', 'Essential for spiritual renewal', 7),
(750017, 'Prophetic intercession involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Casual prayer","Standing in the gap between God and people","Personal requests only","Ritual recitation"]', 'Standing in the gap between God and people', 8),
(750017, 'The church''s prophetic witness should address:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only spiritual matters","Both personal sin and systemic injustice","Only political issues","Only individual salvation"]', 'Both personal sin and systemic injustice', 9),
(750017, 'Prophetic ministry requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Natural talent alone","Spiritual gifting, character, and accountability","Academic credentials","Political connections"]', 'Spiritual gifting, character, and accountability', 10),
(750017, 'Discuss how the church can maintain a prophetic voice in contemporary culture while remaining faithful to Scripture.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The church maintains prophetic witness by grounding all proclamation in Scripture, speaking truth with love, addressing both personal and social sin, and modeling the values it proclaims.', 11),
(750018, 'Living prophetically means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Predicting the future","Embodying God''s values and speaking His truth in daily life","Isolating from culture","Seeking personal fame"]', 'Embodying God''s values and speaking His truth in daily life', 1),
(750018, 'The prophetic lifestyle is characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Comfort and ease","Holiness, justice, and compassion","Wealth accumulation","Social status"]', 'Holiness, justice, and compassion', 2),
(750018, 'Prophetic people are called to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Conform to culture","Be salt and light in the world","Withdraw from society","Seek political power"]', 'Be salt and light in the world', 3),
(750018, 'The cost of prophetic living may include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Popularity and acceptance","Rejection, persecution, and misunderstanding","Wealth and comfort","Political influence"]', 'Rejection, persecution, and misunderstanding', 4),
(750018, 'Prophetic communities should model:', 'multiple_choice', '["Worldly success","Kingdom values and alternative society","Cultural accommodation","Institutional power"]', 'Kingdom values and alternative society', 5),
(750018, 'The prophetic imagination helps believers:', 'multiple_choice', '["Escape reality","Envision God''s future and live toward it","Ignore present problems","Create fantasy worlds"]', 'Envision God''s future and live toward it', 6),
(750018, 'Prophetic witness in the workplace involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Preaching at coworkers","Integrity, excellence, and Christ-like character","Avoiding non-Christians","Seeking promotion only"]', 'Integrity, excellence, and Christ-like character', 7),
(750018, 'The prophetic call to simplicity challenges:', 'multiple_choice', '["Biblical stewardship","Consumerism and materialism","Generosity","Faithful work"]', 'Consumerism and materialism', 8),
(750018, 'Prophetic hope enables believers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignore present suffering","Persevere with confidence in God''s promises","Deny reality","Escape responsibility"]', 'Persevere with confidence in God''s promises', 9),
(750018, 'The ultimate goal of prophetic living is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal recognition","Glorifying God and advancing His kingdom","Accumulating followers","Political influence"]', 'Glorifying God and advancing His kingdom', 10),
(750018, 'Explain how believers can cultivate a prophetic lifestyle that honors God and impacts their community.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Believers cultivate prophetic living through prayer, Scripture study, Spirit-sensitivity, holy character, compassionate action, and courageous truth-telling in their spheres of influence.', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
